## Checklist

- [ ] Story `status` updated (e.g. `in-progress` → `done`) and activity log appended
- [ ] [`project/BOARD.md`](../project/BOARD.md) reflects the new state
- [ ] No secrets, no `node_modules/`, no large binaries
- [ ] If architectural: an ADR landed in `docs/architecture/`
- [ ] If novel-idea-flagged: an entry landed in [`docs/vision/NOVEL_IDEAS.md`](../docs/vision/NOVEL_IDEAS.md)
- [ ] If decision-grade: an entry landed in [`docs/decisions/DECISIONS_LOG.md`](../docs/decisions/DECISIONS_LOG.md)
